arts.ttl: Millwall appoint ex-Preston and Stoke boss Neil
arts.sum: Millwall appoint former Preston, Sunderland and Stoke City boss Alex Neil as their head coach to replace Neil Harris.

arts.ttl: Preview: Burnley vs. Stoke City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Championship clash between Burnley and Stoke City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Burnley's Jordan Beyer shares significant update in his long road back from injury
arts.sum: Jordan Beyer has taken a major step forward in his long road to recovery by returning to Burnley training.

arts.ttl: Stoke City transfer latest as key double search extends into New Year
arts.sum: Stoke City are continuing plans to try to add ‘a little bit of Championship know-how’ to the squad in the new transfer window – at the same time as the club searches for a new head coach or manager. We’ve got people coming back from injury; Sam Gallagher, Bosun (Lawal), Ben Pearson hopefully not too far away, Enda Stevens
